_comment: The current best BSC. Promote a checkpoint here, run `bsc refresh-analysis`, and the winner-scoped evidence and canonical figure catalog follow. 'best' is the ratified operating point (k=32, lambda=1e-3, site-renorm gauge) with the lowest pooled FVU at the largest training budget; frontier and off-point runs stay out of contention.
site_renorm_scalars_source: pilot 2M-token whitener fit used to train this checkpoint; production refits on its calibration slice
notes: Tranche-6 epochs cell (6M train split x 4 epochs, full v2.4 stack: guard + streaming theta + rcap 1.0; zero guard events, dead frac 0.0). Beat the 0.9.6 pilot winner (0.4154 at 12M tokens) and the fresh-token 12m_renorm cell (0.4098, spike-marred). Block identities (b595 month, b862 weekday, b1781 atlas) belong to the superseded pilot run - re-derive capture maps before reusing block indices.
